title: Pizza nutrition table — Salami / Italian Sausage / toppings macro grid
html:
Pizza-toppings nutrition grid screenshot — Salami, Italian Sausage, Shredded Parmesan-Asiago, Spinach, Diced Tomatoes, Hot Buffalo Sauce, Anchovies, BBQ Chicken, Chorizo, fresh tomatoes, garlic, green olives, etc. — with calorie / fat / sodium per portion. More Brotein dataset feed.
